prestazioni: Upgrade the **4G62T (1.8L SOHC 8V turbocharged inline-4)** with a **Garrett GT2860RS-5 turbocharger** (60-62 trim, .63 A/R turbine housing) paired with a **custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe** and **HKS Hi-Power 70mm wastegate** to target 280-300whp while maintaining low-end torque for the FWD platform.

Replace the stock **Mitsubishi E6T ECU** with a **Haltech Elite 1500 standalone ECU**, utilizing a **custom 4-bar MAP sensor** and **AEM X-Series wideband O2 sensor** for precise fueling. Pair with **ID1000x injectors** and a **Walbro 255 lph in-tank fuel pump** to support E85 blends (up to 50% mix) for increased power and cooling efficiency.

Strengthen the drivetrain with a **PPG Stage 2 5-speed dog engagement gearset** (close-ratio: 2.35, 1.76, 1.37, 1.03, 0.85) in the **KM119 transmission**, paired with a **OS Giken Super Lock limited-slip differential** and **Spec Stage 3+ clutch** with a **chromoly flywheel** to handle the increased torque without slipping.
estetica: Install a **Rocket Bunny V1 Cordia-specific widebody kit** (fiberglass fenders, carbon fiber front splitter, and rear diffuser) with **custom 3-piece Work Meister S1 3P wheels** (15x8 +20 front, 15x9 +25 rear) wrapped in **Yokohama Advan A052 tires** (195/50/15 front, 225/50/15 rear) for aggressive stance and grip.

Replace the stock pop-up headlights with **custom Hella H4 projector headlights** (black housing, 55W HID bulbs) and add **GReddy Type-S rear LED taillights** with sequential turn signals. Paint the entire body in **Mitsubishi Racing Green (code: 418)** with **3M Matte Black vinyl overlays** on the hood, roof, and rear hatch for a stealth JDM aesthetic.

Fabricate a **custom aluminum rear wing** (20mm chord, 1200mm span) mounted on **Volk Racing GT-V rear strut bars** for rigidity, paired with a **Cusco front strut tower bar** and **polyurethane bushings** (Energy Suspension) to reduce chassis flex. Interior upgrades include **Recaro SRD seats** (retrimmed in **Nismo red Alcantara**) and a **Momo Prototipo steering wheel** (350mm, suede) with a **NRG quick-release hub**.
